privileged_info_summary: VitalDB Open Dataset is a real, publicly available collection of 6,388 high-fidelity surgical vital signs cases from Seoul National University Hospital. Case0006 exists in the official VitalDB repository on PhysioNet (4.6 MB file), but is not present in the local task data directory (which contains only cases 0001-0003). Case0006 contains 67 signal tracks but critically lacks the Solar8000/ART_MBP (invasive arterial blood pressure) track claimed by the task—it only has Solar8000/NIBP_MBP (non-invasive blood pressure). The task's critical supporting files (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1, and ground_truth JSON) do not exist in the task directory. The verifier expects a ground_truth window of 8-13 minutes and will use these defaults if the file cannot be accessed.
